history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed to compile due to removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter in Spring Security 6 and missing ConstructorBinding symbol.
history.qwen_rationale: Spring Security 6 removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, requiring migration to SecurityFilterChain beans. The observation library provides a dedicated AST rewrite recipe to perform this migration. Inserting it immediately after the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step will resolve the compilation failure before proceeding to Java 17/21 transforms.

history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed to compile due to missing @ConstructorBinding annotation and removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class in Spring Security 6.
history.qwen_rationale: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe updates dependencies but does not always remove deprecated annotations like @ConstructorBinding or rewrite WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter subclasses. Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices helps clean up legacy annotations, and the custom RewriteWebSecurityConfigurerAdapterToFilterChain recipe explicitly converts the deprecated security adapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean pattern required by Spring Security 6.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because SpringBoot3BestPractices does not exist in the current OpenRewrite version, and the custom wsca_to_filter_chain recipe is not in the allowed primitives.
history.qwen_rationale: Remove the non-existent SpringBoot3BestPractices and the custom security recipe, relying on UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 to handle the Spring Boot 2.6 to 3.3 migration (including Jakarta EE and security adapter changes) internally, then proceed with standard Java 17/21 transforms.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 due to missing @ConstructorBinding and WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter classes after Spring Boot 3 migration.
history.qwen_rationale: Spring Boot 3 removes @ConstructorBinding (constructor binding is now default) and WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (replaced by SecurityFilterChain beans). The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe updates the POM but may not fully rewrite these specific usages in this project. Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices helps clean up deprecated SB3 patterns, and splicing the custom WSCA-to-FilterChain recipe directly into the SB3 upgrade step ensures the AST is rewritten before mvn compile runs, preventing the immediate compilation failure.

history.qwen_observation: The upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 step failed because SpringBoot3BestPractices and com.claude.recipes.RewriteWebSecurityConfigurerAdapterToFilterChain are not valid OpenRewrite recipes in the allowed primitives list.
history.qwen_rationale: Remove the non-existent recipes from the Spring Boot upgrade step. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe alone handles javax→jakarta namespace migration and WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter→SecurityFilterChain conversion. The project uses javax.xml.bind which will be migrated by the SB3 upgrade. Keep the chain simple with only standard recipes.
